title: Intel 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for Intel revenue, profitability, business segments, risks, and strategic context.

title: Intel Products Overview
note: Official overview of Intel product families including Core, Xeon, Arc, accelerators, networking, and related platform products.

title: Intel Processors
note: Official processor-family page used to ground Core and Xeon product descriptions.

title: Intel Corporation Market Capitalization
note: Point-in-time market capitalization and ranking reference for Intel on May 24, 2026.

title: RISC-V International FAQ
note: Explains RISC-V as an open standard ISA and clarifies the distinction between open ISA standards and open source processor implementations.

title: Who We Are
note: Describes CHIPS Alliance work on open source hardware code, IP, tools, and verification infrastructure.

title: OpenPOWER Foundation
note: Foundation source for OpenPOWER's open ISA and hardware ecosystem positioning.

title: OpenPOWER Instruction Set Architecture
note: Public specification page for the Power ISA used to assess OpenPOWER as an open server-compute alternative.

title: Open Compute Project Server Project
note: Reference for open server hardware coordination, validation, and data center design alternatives.
